level_signals: 6–10 years of experience in community-led growth, partnerships, developer advocacy, influencer marketing, or startup growth
Owns program design and external relationship tracks independently

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6–10 years of experience in community-led growth, partnerships, developer advocacy, influencer marketing, or startup growth
You've run an ambassador or advocate program before, or you've been an ambassador yourself and understand what actually makes them feel valued and excited
Strong network instincts: you know how to identify who's credible in a community before everyone else does, and you know how to build a relationship that lasts longer than a campaign
High external EQ — you're genuinely energized by other people's success and know how to celebrate it without making it about the company
Comfortable managing multiple external relationships simultaneously across different geographies, time zones, and community types

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with partnership structures, sponsorships, or co-marketing agreements is a strong plus

scope.surface: Lovable Ambassador Program and Community Partnership tracks
scope.business_model: PLG / developer-facing SaaS, B2C and B2B (solopreneurs to Fortune 100)
primary_metrics_inferred: Ambassador program health and activation rate
Number and quality of community partnerships established
core_responsibilities: Own the design and structure of the Lovable Ambassador Program
Lead outbound sourcing and ambassador relationship building
Run the 1:1 intake process for each new ambassador
Build and manage the ambassador toolkit to ensure high quality activations and brand representation
Own and design Lovable's community partnership tracks
Identify and establish strategic partnerships with aligned communities or education providers
Surface product feedback from ambassadors and partners to the PM team on a regular cadence
Track and report on program health across internal crossfunctional teams and initiatives

green_flags: Clear ownership of a high-impact, nascent program with room to shape it from scratch
Company explicitly values 'extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration' — cultural signal for autonomy
Lovable has strong product traction (hundreds of millions of monthly visits mentioned)
Role is well-scoped with distinct workstreams: ambassador program, community partnerships, ecosystem health
red_flags: Location not explicitly stated for this role — Stockholm office mentioned but remote eligibility is unclear
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
No mention of team size or who this role reports to

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years range and scope of ownership)
location.type (unclear — Stockholm mentioned as company base but role location not specified for this position)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred as false given Stockholm HQ, but not explicitly stated)
ambiguities: Location: JD mentions the company is based in Stockholm but does not explicitly state whether this role is onsite in Stockholm, hybrid, or remote-eligible. Treated as 'unclear'.
Years range of 6–10 listed as a single bracket rather than a hard floor — could be interpreted as a guideline rather than a strict cutoff, but classified as hard given unconditional bullet placement.
